title: gesneriaceae
intro: The Gesneriaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of approximately 1,300 species of plants, commonly known as gesneriads or African violets, which are characterized by their showy, trumpet-shaped flowers and often unique growth habits. Many species within the Gesneriaceae family are popular houseplants due to their ease of cultivation and decorative appeal. They are native to tropical regions around the world, particularly in Central and South America, as well as parts of Asia and Africa.
